notes: Same runner logic as claude_code_models.json, but used for code audits.
For non-Anthropic models, use command_prefix: ['ollama','launch','claude'] with main_model as the Ollama tag.
isolate_home defaults to false so Claude subscription auth (read from ~/.claude/) works.
Set to true only when auth is via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and you want strict user-level agent isolation.

variants.label: Claude Opus 4.7 auditor
variants.selection_reason: Highest reasoning quality for catching subtle LangChain/Channels hallucinations and cross-file consistency. Most expensive.

variants.label: Claude Sonnet 4.6 auditor
variants.selection_reason: Mid-tier auditor. Good code reading, faster turnaround. Will likely match Opus on obvious API calls but may miss edge cases.

variants.label: Claude Haiku 4.5 auditor
variants.selection_reason: Cheapest, fastest. Risk of shallow reads on multi-file audits — better suited to a single-file pass or a first-pass screen.

variants.label: Kimi K2.6 (Ollama Cloud) auditor
variants.selection_reason: Alternative auditor via Ollama Cloud. Tests whether the same model that built the project can audit it (or a different model under the same harness).
